message:
test(e2e): add --robot-inspect-pane command tests (ntm-ux4w)

Add 6 E2E tests for the --robot-inspect-pane TUI parity command:
- TestRobotInspectPaneNonExistentSession: SESSION_NOT_FOUND error handling
- TestRobotInspectPanePaneNotFound: PANE_NOT_FOUND error with valid session
- TestRobotInspectPaneSuccessStructure: Full response structure validation
- TestRobotInspectPaneInspectLinesFlag: --inspect-lines flag handling
- TestRobotInspectPaneInspectCodeFlag: --inspect-code flag for code block parsing
- TestRobotInspectPaneAgentHints: _agent_hints presence and structure

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
